```css
100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100| 0|10|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|10|100|100|100|100|100|10|10|10|10|10|100|100|100|100|100|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|0|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|1|10|10|10|10|10|10|1|10|10|0|10|10|10|10|10|0|10|0|10|10|10|10|10|10|1|1|10|10|10|10|1|1|1|1|1|10|0| 10|0|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|1|2|1|0|10|10|1|1|1|2|10|1|1|10|10|1|1|1|1|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|1|1|10|1|10|1|1|1|10|... 2  , 5|... 1|10|20|1
... 1
2, 10|10|10|10|1 1 10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|20|10|10|10|10|10|2 1|20|2|20|25|2|25|25|10|25|20|25|10|10|10|10|10|10|20|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|20|10|10|20|20|10|20|10|10|10|20|10|10|10|20|20|10|20|20|20|10|10|10|20|10|20|10|10|10|10

10|2|10|10|10|10|10|10

1,5|10|10|10|1
